completion_requirements: H-A acellular medium-integrity and physical-stability rows must be real, non-placeholder, non-synthetic measurements.
H-B electrochemical/physical rows must prove the lead adds electrical value without instability.
H-C neural viability, neurite/morphology, and MEA network rows must be non-inferior to controls.
Long-duration CL1-like MEA/network follow-up must pass on real rows.
The final limina_suitability_claim_audit must report claim_ready true for a candidate.

h_a_next_action: Replace fixture, pending, and record_actual/record_lot placeholders with real measured provenance before interpreting H-A.

next_actions.command: manual: open reports/limina_first_wave_rfq_dispatch_cockpit.html and send ready first-wave RFQs
next_actions.success_criterion: Real confirmation files are saved for sent H-A and ZRC vendors, then send-confirmation intake and send-log apply can advance the sourcing chain.
next_actions.why: The combined cockpit is the shortest path from prepared RFQ artifacts to real send confirmations for both active measurement branches.

next_actions.success_criterion: Saved confirmations or replies are reflected into source-backed send/reply logs without creating measurement evidence.
next_actions.why: After any real send confirmation or vendor reply is saved, the combined processor runs both H-A and ZRC intake/apply/evaluate/audit chains.

next_actions.success_criterion: Second-wave candidates remain planning-only rows until a source-backed measurement package is created and the final claim audit still reports false.
next_actions.why: The first-wave measurement route is waiting on real confirmations/replies, so the highest-ranked non-active candidates can be scope-locked without creating suitability evidence.

next_actions.success_criterion: Scope-lock tasks are reviewed while claim_ready remains false and no task is treated as measured material evidence.
next_actions.why: The second-wave queue has been translated into concrete material-identity, trigger-boundary, and future source-class tasks.

next_actions.command: manual: use data/nhi_pedot_h_a_rfq_dispatch_archive/nhi_pedot_h_a_rfq_dispatch_archive.zip or reports/nhi_pedot_h_a_rfq_send_cockpit.html to send ready drafts
next_actions.success_criterion: Each sent vendor has a real sent-email export, web-form confirmation, PDF, or screenshot saved under data/rfq_send_confirmation_files/h_a, after h_a_vendor_contact_source_audit_ready, h_a_rfq_dispatch_manifest_ready, h_a_rfq_dispatch_archive_ready, and h_a_rfq_eml_integrity_ready remain true.
next_actions.why: The RFQ .eml drafts and vendor bundles are ready, contact-source audited, integrity checked, bound into a dispatch manifest, and packaged into a single dispatch archive; real H-A measurements cannot arrive until the first-wave outreach is actually sent.

next_actions.command: manual: use reports/zrc_nd_phase_a_rfq_send_cockpit.html or data/zrc_nd_phase_a_rfq_dispatch_archive/zrc_nd_phase_a_rfq_dispatch_archive.zip to send ready RFQs
next_actions.success_criterion: Each sent ZRC Phase A vendor has a real sent-email export, web-form confirmation, PDF, or screenshot saved under data/rfq_send_confirmation_files/zrc_phase_a.
next_actions.why: The portfolio bypass audit says the only current non-H-A branch still needs real ZRC Phase A measurements before any non-H-A claim.

next_actions.success_criterion: The intake registers real confirmation files with matching bundle hashes or flags rows for human review.
next_actions.why: Saved ZRC send confirmations need to be parsed or flagged before replies are trusted as source-backed.

next_actions.success_criterion: Non-EML ZRC confirmations are applied only when a real source file exists, current SHA-256 is recorded, bundle hash matches the dispatch manifest, and apply=yes is human-reviewed.
next_actions.why: Web-form/PDF/screenshot confirmations need a guarded manual entry path before the ZRC send log is trusted.

next_actions.success_criterion: The send log has valid sent rows and tracker contact dates for sent first-wave ZRC vendors.
next_actions.why: Verified send rows must be reflected into the ZRC quote tracker before reply intake and provider selection.

next_actions.command: manual: save original replies under data/rfq_reply_files/zrc_phase_a
next_actions.success_criterion: Every received vendor reply, quote PDF, proposal, or clarification email is saved at the path listed in reports/zrc_nd_phase_a_rfq_reply_action_pack.md.
next_actions.why: Vendor replies are needed for execution selection but must be preserved as original source files.

next_actions.success_criterion: The intake registers real confirmation files with matching bundle hashes or flags rows for human review.
next_actions.why: Saved confirmations should be parsed before the tracker is treated as source-backed outreach.

next_actions.success_criterion: Non-EML confirmations are applied only when a real source file exists, current SHA-256 is recorded, bundle hash matches the dispatch manifest, and apply=yes is human-reviewed.
next_actions.why: If the RFQ was sent through a web form, PDF/screenshot/saved-page confirmations need a guarded manual entry path before the send log is trusted.

next_actions.success_criterion: The send log has valid sent rows and tracker contact dates for the sent first-wave vendors.
next_actions.why: Verified send rows must be reflected into the RFQ send log and quote tracker before replies are accepted as sourced.

next_actions.command: manual: save original replies under data/rfq_reply_files/h_a
next_actions.success_criterion: Every received vendor reply, quote PDF, proposal, or clarification email is saved at the path listed in reports/nhi_pedot_h_a_rfq_reply_action_pack.md.
next_actions.why: Vendor replies are the next external input after verified sends, but they must be preserved as original source files.

next_actions.success_criterion: Source-backed replies are registered for review without auto-scoring or provider selection.
next_actions.why: Reply intake only registers parsable source-backed replies after verified sends and leaves quote interpretation to review.

next_actions.success_criterion: The reply log has valid received rows and applies only source-backed review fields.
next_actions.why: Reviewed reply fields should be applied to the tracker before provider scoring.

next_actions.success_criterion: Quote selection reports ready_to_select_provider only when reply fields pass hard requirements and the scorecard threshold.
next_actions.why: The scorecard should choose execution partners by raw-data fidelity and field coverage rather than narrative vendor claims.

next_actions.success_criterion: Execution authorization is source-backed for the selected provider or remains explicitly waiting for human authorization.
next_actions.why: A selected provider still needs human authorization before samples are released.

next_actions.success_criterion: Execution is released only when the audit has no blockers and the authorized provider is source-backed.
next_actions.why: The release audit checks that provider selection, authorization, custody, sample submission, and return expectations are all satisfied.

next_actions.success_criterion: Vendor return intake reports vendor_return_ready_for_merge only when required return files and source_file references are present.
next_actions.why: Once a vendor returns files, the inbox checker verifies raw CSV schema, chain-of-custody, deviation log, bundle-entry sheet, and source_file references before merge/QC.

next_actions.success_criterion: The vendor bundle-entry sheet is ready, points source_file defaults at the vendor return inbox, and has no ready rows until real returned files are reviewed.
next_actions.why: The compact returned bundle-entry path needs a scaffold in the vendor inbox so providers can fill one row per source-file bundle.

next_actions.success_criterion: Returned apply=yes bundle rows are expanded into source-value rows with allowed source_file references and zero errors.
next_actions.why: The compact returned bundle-entry sheet can fill source-value rows without hand-copying 228 individual entries.

next_actions.success_criterion: Extraction finds real raw CSV files and emits no schema or source-reference errors.
next_actions.why: Raw vendor CSV exports should be converted to source-value rows before merge.

next_actions.success_criterion: Import applies only rows with filled values and real source_file provenance.
next_actions.why: Source-value rows from returned bundles or raw CSV extraction must be imported before active H-A runs can change.

next_actions.success_criterion: Raw rows have been merged into active runs and no unresolved target or unknown run_id errors remain.
next_actions.why: Raw instrument/inspection entries should be merged into an active runs CSV before QC.

next_actions.success_criterion: H-A intake QC reports h_a_intake_ready with zero errors and claimable measured provenance.
next_actions.why: The leading route cannot move until the acellular medium/physical sentinel has QC-clean real rows.

next_actions.success_criterion: H-A interpretation is no longer h_a_invalid_provenance and measured_row_count equals row_count for required sentinel rows.
next_actions.why: The H-A interpreter should only be trusted after intake QC is clean.

next_actions.success_criterion: Recommended rows match the remaining unmet H-A coverage instead of stale no-data rows.
next_actions.why: The selector should be regenerated after any new measured rows land.

next_actions.success_criterion: The packet rows match the current next-measurement selector and remain marked as pending until real values are entered.
next_actions.why: The data-entry packet should reflect the current selector output and recipe lock.

next_actions.success_criterion: Variant ladder still ranks the 0.6 wt percent lead first and records trigger conditions for rescue variants.
next_actions.why: Current lead is alg_lam_pedot_0p6pct_lead; rescue routes are predeclared but must wait for measured H-A signals.
